title: Man shot during armed robbery, suspects arrested
description: KWANONQABA NEWS - Three men have been...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KWANONQABA NEWS - Three men have been arrested by the KwaNonqaba Police following an armed robbery at a shop in Adriaans Avenue, KwaNonqaba on Friday 16 January.","html":"KWANONQABA NEWS - Three men have been arrested by the KwaNonqaba Police following an armed robbery at a shop in Adriaans Avenue, KwaNonqaba on Friday 16 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to Southern Cape Police spokesperson, Warrant Officer Chris Spies, one employee was inside the shop when the three suspects entered."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Spies, one of the suspects was allegedly in possession of a firearm.","html":"According to Spies, one of the suspects was allegedly in possession of a firearm."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He says a preliminary investigation suggests that an altercation took place, leading to the firing of several gunshots.","html":"He says a preliminary investigation suggests that an altercation took place, leading to the firing of several gunshots."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The victim has sustained injuries to his legs. An unknown amount of cash and cellphones were also stolen.","html":"The victim has sustained injuries to his legs. An unknown amount of cash and cellphones were also stolen."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The three suspects are currently in police custody and are expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court once they are charged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Investigation into the matter is still ongoing.","html":"Investigation into the matter is still ongoing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man shot during armed robbery, suspects arrested
